name: workspace_manager
description: Read workspace files (rooms, skills, client context, learned knowledge), write client knowledge, or list learned entries. Use this tool to load task-specific instructions before responding.

action.description: Action to perform: read a workspace file, write to learned knowledge, or list learned entries

path.description: Relative path within the workspace (for read action), e.g. rooms/executive-briefing.md

content.description: The knowledge to store (for write action, max 500 characters)

entry_type.description: Type of knowledge entry (for write action)
